references/eClassifiers/KeyValue/referen.title: value
references/eClassifiers/KeyValue/referen.content: Type AnyValue Multiplicity 0..1 The value associated with the key.

references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.title: traceId
references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 A unique identifier of a trace that this linked span is part of.

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: ExponentialHistogramDataPointBuckets
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: Buckets are a set of bucket counts, encoded in a contiguous array of counts. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/MetricsData/refe.title: resourceMetrics
references/eClassifiers/MetricsData/refe.content: Type ResourceMetrics Multiplicity 0..* An array of ResourceMetrics.

references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.title: spanId
references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 A unique identifier for the linked span.

references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/re.title: schemaUrl
references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/re.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 The URL of the schema that all spans in this message are following.

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: body
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type AnyValue Multiplicity 0..1 A value containing the body of the log record.

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: scale
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 scale describes the resolution of the histogram. Boundaries are located at powers of the base, where base = (2(2-scale))

references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/index.h.title: SpanLink
references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/index.h.content: A pointer from the current span to another span in the same trace or in a different trace. For example, this can be used in batching operations, where a single batch handler processes multiple requests from different traces or when the handler receives a request from a different project. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/SpanStatus/index.title: SpanStatus
references/eClassifiers/SpanStatus/index.content: The Status type defines a logical error model that is suitable for different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.title: NumberDataPoint
references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.content: NumberDataPoint is a single data point in a timeseries that describes the time-varying scalar value of a metric. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: severityNumber
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type SeverityNumber Multiplicity 0..1 Numerical value of the severity, normalized to values described in the log data model.

references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.title: name
references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 An empty instrumentation scope name means the name is unknown.

references/eClassifiers/TracesData/index.title: TracesData
references/eClassifiers/TracesData/index.content: TracesData represents the traces export payload which can be serialized to different formats, e.g., OTLP/gRPC, JSON, and proto. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.title: AGGREGATION_TEMPORALITY_UNSPECIFIED
references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.content: UNSPECIFIED is the default AggregationTemporality, it MUST not be used.

references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.title: AggregationTemporality
references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.content: AggregationTemporality defines how a metric aggregator reports aggregated values. It describes how those values relate to the time interval over which they are aggregated.

references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.title: attributes
references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* attributes is a collection of attribute key/value pairs on the link.

references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.title: value
references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.content: Type EDouble Multiplicity 0..1 The value at the given quantile of a distribution.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: status
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type SpanStatus Multiplicity 0..1 An optional final status for this span. Semantically when Status isn’t set, it means span’s status code is unset, i.e. assume STATUS_CODE_UNSET (code = 0).

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: observedTimeUnixNano
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..1 Time when the event was observed by the collection system.

references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/index.h.title: SpanKind
references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/index.h.content: SpanKind is the type of span. Can be used to specify additional relationships between spans in addition to a parent/child relationship.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: flags
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 Flags, a bit field. 8 least significant bits are the trace flags as defined in W3C Trace Context specification.

references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.title: InstrumentationScope
references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.content: InstrumentationScope is a message representing the instrumentation scope information such as the fully qualified name and version. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ResourceLogs/ind.title: ResourceLogs
references/eClassifiers/ResourceLogs/ind.content: A collection of ScopeLogs from a Resource. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.title: SPAN_KIND_UNSPECIFIED
references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.content: Unspecified. Do NOT use as default. Implementations MAY assume SpanKind to be INTERNAL when receiving UNSPECIFIED.

references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.title: AGGREGATION_TEMPORALITY_DELTA
references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.content: DELTA is an AggregationTemporality for a metric aggregator which reports changes since last report time.

references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/referen.title: kvlistValue
references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/referen.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* Represents a list of key-value pairs.

references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/re.title: scopeSpans
references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/re.content: Type ScopeSpans Multiplicity 0..* A list of ScopeSpans that originate from a resource.

references/eClassifiers/ScopeSpans/index.title: ScopeSpans
references/eClassifiers/ScopeSpans/index.content: A collection of Spans produced by an InstrumentationScope. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: traceState
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 trace_state conveys information about request position in multiple distributed tracing graphs. It is a vendor-specific format as described by the W3C Trace Context specification.

references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.title: count
references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..1 count is the number of values in the population.

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: positive
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: Type ExponentialHistogramDataPointBuckets Multiplicity 0..1 positive carries the positive range of exponential bucket counts.

references/eClassifiers/Metric/index.htm.title: Metric
references/eClassifiers/Metric/index.htm.content: Defines a Metric which has one or more timeseries. The following is a brief summary of the Metric data model. Metric is a named entity with a description and unit. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.title: SPAN_KIND_CONSUMER
references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.content: Indicates that the span describes consumer receiving a message from a broker. Like the PRODUCER kind, there is often no direct critical-path latency relationship between producer and consumer spans.

references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.title: unit
references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 unit in which the metric value is reported. Follows the format described by http://unitsofmeasure.org/ucum.html.

references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/re.title: resource
references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/re.content: Type Resource Multiplicity 0..1 The resource for the spans in this message. If this field is not set then no resource info is known.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: kind
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type SpanKind Multiplicity 0..1 Distinguishes between spans generated in a particular context.

references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.title: HistogramDataPoint
references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.content: HistogramDataPoint is a single data point in a timeseries that describes the time-varying values of a Histogram. Diagram

index.html.title: Telemetry Model
index.html.content: An Ecore model of OpenTelemetry concepts - traces, spans, metrics, logs, and supporting types. Based on the OpenTelemetry specification: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/otel/ changeDescription logRecords Span ResourceSpans ExponentialHistogramDataPointBuckets SummaryDataPoint AnyValue SpanEvent events LogsData Metric TracesData resourceSpans MetricsData SummaryDataPointValueAtQuantile quantileValues ExponentialHistogram InstrumentationScope HistogramDataPoint ExponentialHistogramDataPoint positive negative dataPoints NumberDataPoint ScopeSpans scope spans scopeSpans span Exemplar exemplars exemplars exemplars ScopeMetrics scope metrics AggregationTemporality Histogram dataPoints SpanLink links SpanStatus status Sum dataPoints KeyValue value attributes filteredAttributes attributes attributes attributes attributes metadata attributes kvlistValue attributes attributes ResourceMetrics scopeMetrics resourceMetrics StatusCode Resource attributes resource resource ResourceLogs resource resourceLogs Summary dataPoints SeverityNumber LogRecord body attributes SpanKind Gauge dataPoints ScopeLogs logRecords scope scopeLogs ChangeDescription Telemetry

references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.title: SPAN_KIND_SERVER
references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.content: Indicates that the span covers server-side handling of an RPC or other remote network request.

references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/referen.title: arrayValue
references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/referen.content: Type AnyValue Multiplicity 0..* Represents an array of any value.

references/eClassifiers/ScopeMetrics/ind.title: ScopeMetrics
references/eClassifiers/ScopeMetrics/ind.content: A collection of Metrics produced by an Scope. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: name
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type EString Multiplicity 1 A description of the span’s operation. For example, the name can be a qualified method name or a file name and a line number where the operation is called. A best practice is to use the same display name at the same call point repeatably, so that users can filter and group spans based on the name.

references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.title: attributes
references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* Set of attributes that describe the resource.

references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.title: attributes
references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* Additional attributes that describe the scope. Use of this parameter is optional.

references/eClassifiers/StatusCode/index.title: StatusCode
references/eClassifiers/StatusCode/index.content: For the semantics of status codes see https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification/blob/main/specification/trace/api.md#set-status

references/eClassifiers/ScopeLogs/index..title: ScopeLogs
references/eClassifiers/ScopeLogs/index..content: A collection of Logs produced by a Scope. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Span/index.html.title: Span
references/eClassifiers/Span/index.html.content: A Span represents a single operation performed by a single component of the system. The next available field id is 17. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.title: explicitBounds
references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.content: Type EDouble Multiplicity 0..* explicit_bounds specifies buckets with explicitly defined bounds for values.

references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.title: quantile
references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.content: Type EDouble Multiplicity 0..1 The quantile of a distribution. Must be in the interval [0.0, 1.0].

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: endTimeUnixNano
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..1 end_time_unix_nano is the end time of the span. On the client side, this is the time kept by the local machine where the span execution ends. On the server side, this is the time when the server application handler stops running. Value is UNIX Epoch time in nanoseconds since 00:00:00 UTC on 1 January 1970.

references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.title: name
references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.content: Type EString Multiplicity 1 name of the metric, including its DNS name prefix. It must be unique.

references/eClassifiers/Resource/index.h.title: Resource
references/eClassifiers/Resource/index.h.content: Resource represents the entity producing telemetry as Attributes. For example, a process producing telemetry that is running in a container on Kubernetes has a Pod name, it is in a namespace and possibly is part of a Deployment which also has a name. All three of these attributes can be included in the Resource. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ScopeSpans/refer.title: scope
references/eClassifiers/ScopeSpans/refer.content: Type InstrumentationScope Multiplicity 0..1 The instrumentation scope information for the spans in this message. Semantically when InstrumentationScope isn’t set, it is equivalent with an empty instrumentation scope name (unknown).

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: flags
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 Flags, a bit field.

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: ExponentialHistogramDataPoint
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: ExponentialHistogramDataPoint is a single data point in a timeseries that describes the time-varying values of a ExponentialHistogram of double values. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.title: asDouble
references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.content: Type EDoubleObject Multiplicity 0..1 value as a double. Either asDouble or asInt must be set.

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: spanId
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 A unique identifier for a span within a trace. If present, this log record is associated with a specific span.

references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/refere.title: attributes
references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/refere.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* attributes is a collection of attribute key/value pairs on the event.

references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.title: SPAN_KIND_CLIENT
references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.content: Indicates that the span describes a request to some remote service.

references/eClassifiers/TracesData/refer.title: resourceSpans
references/eClassifiers/TracesData/refer.content: Type ResourceSpans Multiplicity 0..* An array of ResourceSpans. For data coming from a single resource this array will typically contain one element. Intermediary nodes that receive data from multiple origins typically batch the data before forwarding further.

references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.title: flags
references/eClassifiers/SpanLink/referen.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 Flags, a bit field.

references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/in.title: ResourceSpans
references/eClassifiers/ResourceSpans/in.content: A collection of ScopeSpans from a Resource. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.title: schemaUrl
references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 schema_url contains the URL that describes the semantics of the attributes.

references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.title: metadata
references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* Additional metadata attributes that describe the metric.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: traceId
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 A unique identifier for a trace. All spans from the same trace share the same trace_id. The ID is a 16-byte array.

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: severityText
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 The severity text (also known as log level). The original string representation as it is known at the source.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: parentSpanId
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 The span_id of this span’s parent span. If this is a root span, then this field must be empty. The ID is an 8-byte array.

references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.title: SummaryDataPointValueAtQuantile
references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.content: Represents the value at a given quantile of a distribution. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/MetricsData/inde.title: MetricsData
references/eClassifiers/MetricsData/inde.content: MetricsData represents the metrics export payload which can be serialized to different formats, e.g., OTLP/gRPC, JSON, and proto. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/refere.title: name
references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/refere.content: Type EString Multiplicity 1 name of the event. This field is semantically required to be set to non-empty string by OpenTelemetry API when the event is created explicitly by the instrumentation libraries.

references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.title: SPAN_KIND_INTERNAL
references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.content: Indicates that the span represents an internal operation within an application, as opposed to an operations happening at the boundaries of a process.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: attributes
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* attributes is a collection of key/value pairs. Note, global attributes like server name can be set using the resource API.

references/eClassifiers/ResourceMetrics/.title: ResourceMetrics
references/eClassifiers/ResourceMetrics/.content: A collection of ScopeMetrics from a Resource. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Sum/references/e.title: isMonotonic
references/eClassifiers/Sum/references/e.content: Type EBoolean Multiplicity 0..1 If true, the sum is monotonically increasing.

references/eClassifiers/LogsData/index.h.title: LogsData
references/eClassifiers/LogsData/index.h.content: LogsData represents the logs export payload which can be serialized to different formats, e.g., OTLP/gRPC, JSON, and proto. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.title: min
references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.content: Type EDoubleObject Multiplicity 0..1 min is the minimum value over (start_time, end_time].

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: zeroCount
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..1 zero_count is the count of values in the zero bucket.

references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.title: droppedAttributesCount
references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 droppedAttributesCount is the number of dropped attributes. If the value is 0, then no attributes were dropped.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: startTimeUnixNano
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..1 start_time_unix_nano is the start time of the span. On the client side, this is the time kept by the local machine where the span execution starts. On the server side, this is the time when the server’s application handler starts running. Value is UNIX Epoch time in nanoseconds since 00:00:00 UTC on 1 January 1970.

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: timeUnixNano
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..1 time_unix_nano is the time when the event occurred. Value is UNIX Epoch time in nanoseconds since 00:00:00 UTC on 1 January 1970.

references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.title: schemaUrl
references/eClassifiers/InstrumentationS.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 schema_url contains the URL that describes the semantics of the attributes.

references/eClassifiers/ScopeSpans/refer.title: spans
references/eClassifiers/ScopeSpans/refer.content: Type Span Multiplicity 0..* A list of Spans that originate from an instrumentation scope.

references/eClassifiers/SpanStatus/refer.title: code
references/eClassifiers/SpanStatus/refer.content: Type StatusCode Multiplicity 0..1 The status code.

references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/referen.title: filteredAttributes
references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/referen.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* The set of key/value pairs that were filtered out by the aggregator, but recorded alongside the original measurement.

references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/referen.title: bytesValue
references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/referen.content: Type EByteArray Multiplicity 0..1 Represents raw bytes value.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: events
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type SpanEvent Multiplicity 0..* events is a collection of Event items.

references/eClassifiers/SpanStatus/refer.title: message
references/eClassifiers/SpanStatus/refer.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 A developer-facing human readable error message.

references/eClassifiers/Summary/index.ht.title: Summary
references/eClassifiers/Summary/index.ht.content: Summary metric data are used to convey quantile summaries. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/StatusCode/refer.title: STATUS_CODE_OK
references/eClassifiers/StatusCode/refer.content: The Span has been validated by an Application developer or Operator to have completed successfully.

references/eClassifiers/Sum/index.html.title: Sum
references/eClassifiers/Sum/index.html.content: Sum represents the type of a scalar metric that is calculated as a sum of all reported measurements over a time interval. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: offset
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 Offset is the bucket index of the first entry in the bucket_counts array.

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: attributes
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type KeyValue Multiplicity 0..* Additional attributes that describe the specific event occurrence.

references/eClassifiers/LogsData/referen.title: resourceLogs
references/eClassifiers/LogsData/referen.content: Type ResourceLogs Multiplicity 0..* An array of ResourceLogs.

references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.title: SPAN_KIND_PRODUCER
references/eClassifiers/SpanKind/referen.content: Indicates that the span describes a producer sending a message to a broker. Unlike CLIENT and SERVER, there is often no direct critical-path latency relationship between producer and consumer spans.

references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/referen.title: spanId
references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 (Optional) Span ID of the exemplar trace. span_id may be missing if the measurement is not recorded inside a trace or if the trace is not sampled.

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: ExponentialHistogram
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: ExponentialHistogram represents the type of a metric that is calculated by aggregating as a ExponentialHistogram of all reported double measurements over a time interval. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Gauge/index.html.title: Gauge
references/eClassifiers/Gauge/index.html.content: Gauge represents the type of a scalar metric that always exports the current value for every data point. It should be used for an unknown aggregation. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/index..title: LogRecord
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/index..content: A log record according to OpenTelemetry Log Data Model: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/otel/logs/data-model/ Diagram

references/eClassifiers/SeverityNumber/r.title: SEVERITY_NUMBER_UNSPECIFIED
references/eClassifiers/SeverityNumber/r.content: UNSPECIFIED is the default SeverityNumber, it MUST not be used.

references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.title: sum
references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.content: Type EDoubleObject Multiplicity 0..1 sum of the values in the population. If count is zero then this field must be zero.

references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/index.h.title: Exemplar
references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/index.h.content: A representation of an exemplar, which is a sample input measurement. Exemplars also hold information about the environment when the measurement was recorded, for example the span and trace ID of the active span when the exemplar was recorded. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/index.h.title: AnyValue
references/eClassifiers/AnyValue/index.h.content: AnyValue is used to represent any type of attribute value. AnyValue may contain a primitive value such as a string or integer or it may contain an arbitrary nested object containing arrays, key-value lists and primitives. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/referen.title: traceId
references/eClassifiers/Exemplar/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 (Optional) Trace ID of the exemplar trace.

references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.title: negative
references/eClassifiers/ExponentialHisto.content: Type ExponentialHistogramDataPointBuckets Multiplicity 0..1 negative carries the negative range of exponential bucket counts.

references/eClassifiers/KeyValue/index.h.title: KeyValue
references/eClassifiers/KeyValue/index.h.content: KeyValue is a key-value pair that is used to store Span attributes, Link attributes, etc. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.title: SummaryDataPoint
references/eClassifiers/SummaryDataPoint.content: SummaryDataPoint is a single data point in a timeseries that describes the time-varying values of a Summary metric. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: spanId
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 A unique identifier for a span within a trace, assigned when the span is created. The ID is an 8-byte array.

references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.title: AGGREGATION_TEMPORALITY_CUMULATIVE
references/eClassifiers/AggregationTempo.content: CUMULATIVE is an AggregationTemporality for a metric aggregator which reports changes since a fixed start time.

references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.title: asInt
references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.content: Type ELongObject Multiplicity 0..1 value as an integer. Either asDouble or asInt must be set.

references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.title: traceId
references/eClassifiers/LogRecord/refere.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 A unique identifier for a trace. All logs from the same trace share the same trace_id.

references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.title: description
references/eClassifiers/Metric/reference.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 description of the metric, which can be used in documentation.

references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.title: links
references/eClassifiers/Span/references/.content: Type SpanLink Multiplicity 0..* links is a collection of Links, which are references from this span to a span in the same or different trace.

references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.title: bucketCounts
references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..* bucket_counts is an optional field contains the count values of histogram for each bucket.

references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.title: max
references/eClassifiers/HistogramDataPoi.content: Type EDoubleObject Multiplicity 0..1 max is the maximum value over (start_time, end_time].

references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.title: flags
references/eClassifiers/NumberDataPoint/.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 Flags is an optional bit field containing hints for the backends.

references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/refere.title: timeUnixNano
references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/refere.content: Type ELong Multiplicity 0..1 time_unix_nano is the time the event occurred.

references/eClassifiers/Histogram/index..title: Histogram
references/eClassifiers/Histogram/index..content: Histogram represents the type of a metric that is calculated by aggregating as a Histogram of all reported measurements over a time interval. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/index..title: SpanEvent
references/eClassifiers/SpanEvent/index..content: Event is a time-stamped annotation of the span, consisting of user-supplied text description and key-value pairs. Diagram
